<!-- Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? -->

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered -->

## 📚 Use Case / Example
<!-- Provide a concrete example of how this feature would be used -->

### Code Example (if applicable)
```python
# Example of how the feature would work
import pandas as pd

# Your example here
```

## 📊 Impact
**Which components would this affect?**
- [ ] Jupyter Notebooks
- [ ] Utility Scripts (`scripts/`)
- [ ] Streamlit Dashboard
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Data Processing Pipeline
- [ ] Testing
- [ ] Other: _____

<!-- Optional: If you have ideas on how to implement this, share them here -->

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues/PRs to make sure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's goal of teaching pandas
- [ ] I am willing to help implement this feature (optional)
